$schema_note: Phase 1 — Notifications, Settings/Feature-Flags, User & Term Administration, and Audit & Logs. Cross-cutting support modules that most other work packages call into (audit() is used everywhere; notifications are used by corrections/at-risk/OSAS/broadcast).

work_packages.name: Notifications
work_packages.goal: In-app realtime (Socket.IO) + transactional email; per-user preferences and read state.

tasks.title: notifications + notification_preferences Prisma models
tasks.description: data jsonb deep-link payload; notifications(user_id, read_at) indexed; notification_preferences pk (user_id, event_type).

tasks.title: Notification create/list/read + emit helper
tasks.description: Internal notify(userId, type, title, body, data) helper used by other services (corrections, at-risk, OSAS sync failures); GET /notifications, PATCH :id/read, PATCH read-all.

tasks.title: Mailer infra (nodemailer + MJML templates)
tasks.description: SMTP transport (provider-agnostic), MJML-compiled templates for account/reset/at-risk alert emails.
tasks.notes: SMTP provider choice needed — see SystemDefinition5.txt §9.

tasks.title: Preferences endpoints + broadcast endpoint
tasks.description: GET|PATCH /notifications/preferences; POST /notifications/broadcast { audience, title, body } for DA/SA.

tasks.title: token-cleanup cron job
tasks.description: Daily 04:00 — purge expired refresh tokens and stale notifications (>90 days read).

tasks.title: Notifications feed page + topbar bell w/ unread badge
tasks.description: Feed with read state, preference toggles; topbar notification bell with unread count, invalidated on notification:new socket event.

work_packages.name: Settings & Feature Flags
work_packages.goal: Terms, thresholds, QR rotation interval, static-QR allowance, OSAS sync config, module flags, maintenance banner.

tasks.title: settings key/value Prisma model
tasks.description: key text PK, value jsonb, updated_by, updated_at.

tasks.title: GET|PATCH /settings + module feature-flag enforcement
tasks.description: R: DA/SA, W: SA; disabled modules.<key>.enabled hides routes (404) at the router-registration layer, not just the UI.
acceptance_criteria: Disabling a module's flag returns 404 on its routes, not 403

tasks.title: System Settings page (tabbed)
tasks.description: Tabs: general/attendance thresholds, QR rotation interval + static-QR allowance, OSAS config + manual sync triggers, email templates, module feature flags, maintenance banner, timezone/date formats.
tasks.notes: docs/index.html already implements the .settings-wrap / .settings-nav tabbed layout to reuse.

work_packages.name: User & Term Administration
work_packages.goal: Super Admin/Dept Admin user account management beyond the auth module itself.

tasks.title: Users CRUD (SA full, DA non-admin only)
acceptance_criteria: DA cannot create/edit SUPER_ADMIN or DEPT_ADMIN accounts

tasks.title: User Management page (Super Admin)
tasks.description: All accounts, roles, activation, forced resets, device sessions.

work_packages.name: Audit & Logs
work_packages.goal: Audit logs (before/after, actor, IP), activity logs, login logs, attendance logs, OSAS sync logs — append-only.

tasks.title: audit_logs Prisma model (append-only)
tasks.description: actor_user_id nullable (null=system), action (entity.verb), before/after jsonb, ip_address; no UPDATE/DELETE grants at the DB role level.

tasks.title: audit() helper + wire into every mutating service
tasks.description: lib/audit.ts called in services for every mutating action with actor, entity, before/after — logins, overrides, deletions, settings changes, syncs.
deliverables: lib/audit.ts + call sites across auth/qr/settings/users/osas services
acceptance_criteria: Every mutating endpoint in api-specification.json has a corresponding audit_logs row in integration tests
tasks.risk: Easy to forget on new endpoints — enforce via a lint rule or PR checklist item, not memory alone.

tasks.title: GET /audit-logs explorer endpoint
tasks.description: Filterable by actor/entity/action/date; SA sees all, DA sees dept scope.

tasks.title: Audit Logs explorer page (before/after diff view)
tasks.description: Filterable log explorer with before/after diff view.
tasks.notes: docs/index.html already implements the .audit-diff before/after coloring pattern to reuse.

tasks.title: Override/audit trail test
tasks.description: Faculty manual attendance + override with reason → audit entry visible to admin (E2E journey).
